note: Read-only mirror of a compact summary of the TIBER-Data player_season_coverage_v0 candidate artifact, used to evaluate Forecast's coverage/provenance gate for that artifact before any Forecast run, feature binding, or experiment design. The full 2,383-row / ~8.8MB artifact is NOT vendored here; the mirror carries artifact-level identity/status/provenance/scope/grain summaries plus a small representative row sample (4 rows, chosen to exercise single-team, multi-team, single_week, partial_season, full_season, drafted, and undrafted cases) sufficient for the gate to evaluate without network access. Forecast does not modify, re-govern, re-derive, or promote this data.

mirrored_file.derivedFrom: TIBER-Data: data/processed/evidence/player_season_coverage_2022_2025.source_backed.json (as merged to main in PR #191)
mirrored_file.derivation_method: Computed directly from the real, committed TIBER-Data artifact: sha256 of the full file, exact aggregate counts (rows by season/position, multi-team count, duplicate-grain check, draft_year/season_age null counts, fixture/scaffold marker scan), and a small set of representative rows copied verbatim (trimmed to the fields the gate needs). No values in this mirror are fabricated or estimated.
